About Me

A results-driven specialist who combines digital marketing precision with deep tile industry knowledge.

With 2+ years at PGS Tile-Mart, I've managed full-funnel marketing campaigns, showroom operations, and creative production — all under one roof. I don't just run ads; I build systems that convert.

From achieving 85x ROAS on Meta Ads to building product visualization workflows that help customers decide faster, I bring both creative and analytical depth to every project.

PGS Tile-Mart · Madurai, India
May 2024 – Present
  • Managed digital marketing campaigns achieving up to 85x ROAS using Meta Ads
